model_status: Explicit 50 Hz provisional M5 VARIABLE_HIL profile; passive drag fitted to 3379 ft with RocketPy mass and J420R motor unchanged

predictor.passive_fit_method: 12-step deterministic bisection of equal RocketPy power-on/off Cd; target 3379 ft AGL; rocket dry mass, motor mass, thrust curve, environment, and geometry held fixed

provenance.controller_configuration: Explicit M5 VARIABLE_HIL profile at 50 Hz; Normal firmware and the general reference config retain their legacy proportional defaults
provenance.motor_burn_time: VARIABLE_HIL coast/deployment gate is fixed at 1.80 s after liftoff: 1.69 s screening maximum J420R burn plus 0.10 s margin; sampled truth is never sent to the controller
provenance.rocket_drag: PROVISIONAL FIT - Cd 0.526464844 produces 3378.9983 ft AGL against the documented 3379 ft passive reference; residual -0.0017 ft; mass and motor inputs unchanged
provenance.airbrake_drag: PROVISIONAL - baseline CdA 0.002596784 m^2 uses the passive fit; incremental full-deployment CdA 0.009205864 m^2 is derived from 219.286 N at 197.206 m/s assuming rho=1.225 kg/m^3; divided by 0.004932493 m^2 reference area this is RocketPy incremental Cd 1.866371360; 25/50/75 percent points are linear
provenance.airbrake_load: M5 load point: 54.8215 N per fin, 219.286 N total for four fins, 197.206 m/s, assumed rho=1.225 kg/m^3
provenance.actuator_delay: PROVISIONAL 0.10 s command-to-motion delay; replace with loaded bench measurement
provenance.airbrake_mach_scaling: Disabled for VARIABLE_HIL because the only M5 load point is already at 197.206 m/s; a placeholder Mach multiplier would double-count unsupported dependence
